notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Brett Baty reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher Ryne Nelson, assist to first baseman Jose Fernandez.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Brett Baty reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Ildemaro Vargas. Bo Bichette to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Geraldo Perdomo steals (2) 2nd base. Geraldo Perdomo to 3rd. Geraldo Perdomo advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Francisco Alvarez.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Luis Robert Jr. reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Jose Fernandez, assist to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Arenado GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Arenado grounds into a double play, shortstop Francisco Lindor to second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Mark Vientos. Geraldo Perdomo out at 2nd. Nolan Arenado out at 1st.
